title: Announcements, redrawn — What's New is now a wall of landing pages
summary: What's New is no longer a wall of text: every update is a git-tracked Excalidraw board rendered right in the dashboard, pinned to the foot of the sidebar. Ships alongside the 0.19 highlights — agent-authored tasks, board-folder moves, and steadier cloud sync.

title: The Task Manager — every task gets its own live Claude session
summary: Open a task and a dedicated Claude Code session is pinned right inside the task view — it maintains the document for you: revises, summarizes, splits, and reconciles status against what actually happened.

title: A living dock, a smarter sleep, and one-click task delegation
summary: Recent quality-of-life drops across the dashboard and launcher: minimized agent sessions live in a dock, sleep consolidation stopped duplicating knowledge, tasks can be handed to Claude straight from the board, and new projects can be cloned from GitHub inside the onboarding wizard.

title: Goal-Skill v2 — fork the builders, keep the judges clean
summary: The goal orchestrator was rewritten end to end: builder sessions now fork and resume instead of re-exploring, review and validation stay independent, and ceremony scales to the size of the goal.
